contents.text: The menu serves as a central location for players to access core in-game mechanics. It can be opened by using the quick menu hotkey (Default: G).

From this menu, players can open their character's shop, exchange with the team's bank, and warp back to your team's base. Warping takes 3 seconds to activate, and can be interruppted by taking damage. Warping is only available during a match.
